bracu_official.title: BRAC University Law Graduate Awarded Prestigious Joint Doctoral Scholarship Between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney
bracu_official.summary: A BRAC University law graduate has been awarded a prestigious joint doctoral scholarship from the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney.
